actions.text: Roddie Mackay has been elected leader after beating Donald Manford by 18 votes to 13.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Nottingham Forest defender Chris Cohen has been ruled out for the rest of the season with a knee injury.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: defender Jack Hobbs was ruled out until Christmas because of an ankle injury.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police are looking for witnesses to an incident in which an 8-year-old boy was threatened with a weapon and robbed of his clothes.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The DUP leader says his party will push for an English Parliament if the Tories win the election.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Irish boxer Michael Conlan won his quarter-final in the bantamweight division at the European Amateur Boxing Championships in Samsun, Turkey.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Angers midfielder Yohan Benalouane has joined Nottingham Forest on a three-year deal.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has been charged with perverting the course of justice in connection with the death of Michael Freshwater.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Freshwater had been remanded on bail on a class A drugs charge.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Loopallu Festival will no longer offer a campsite.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Three penguins have been stolen from a zoo in Germany.
